reason: Browser-use feature successfully executed: agent opened browser, navigated to https://example.com, and returned the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260515-004549-mw0b" in the sidebar — Agent page loaded with chat interface and empty message history
Clicked on chat input textbox — Textbox became active and focused
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message successfully entered in the input field
Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent and agent began working (status changed to "working")
Waited up to 3 minutes for response mentioning "Example Domain" — Agent completed task in 7 seconds and returned response

Verified response content — Response clearly states: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." Browser preview panel on right side displays the actual Example Domain page. Two browser tool calls are shown: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Page Snapshot" both marked successful with checkmarks
Took final screenshot — Full page screenshot captured showing complete chat session with agent response, browser preview, and activity log
